candidates.notes: Random projection saturates at k=256 (k/d=0.125). PCA wins 2/7 comparisons. TRAK-PCA(k=d) vs RepSim gap: 30.77pp. Pilot limitation: N=100 caps PCA rank.

pilot_limitations: N=100 caps PCA rank at 100, making PCA projections at k>100 identical (all project to rank-100 space)
Random projection Recall@50 may be noisy at pilot scale
Bootstrap CIs from 66 ref queries may be wide
